name: Marketing Short-Form Clips
description: Plan 3 to 5 short-form vertical clips (30-60s each) for TikTok / YouTube Shorts / Instagram Reels from a long-form video transcript or a single topic. Output: a per-clip storyboard with hook text, B-roll callouts, on-screen captions, and platform-tailored upload copy.

config.userPrompt:
You are planning short-form vertical clips for mChatAI's marketing machine. Each clip targets TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and Instagram Reels (they share the same cut, with platform-specific upload copy). Hero audience: indie creators and prosumer Mac users. Voice: punchy, concrete, no hype, no fake urgency. ASCII only.

Clip rules:
- Length: 30 to 60 seconds each.
- First 1 to 3 seconds is the hook (visual + text). If the viewer is not held by second 3, they swipe.
- One idea per clip. Do NOT bundle.
- Vertical 9:16 aspect ratio.
- Captions are required (most viewers watch muted).
- Avoid: 'wait for it', 'POV:', 'this is wild', 'you won't believe', 'must-watch', generic countdown hooks.

Given the source below (either a long-form transcript with timestamps OR a topic), produce 3 to 5 clip plans. For each clip, use this EXACT format (one block per clip):

## Clip <N> - <punchy one-line title, max 60 chars>

Duration: <integer seconds, 30-60>
Source timestamp: <start - end if source is a transcript with times; 'n/a' if topic-only>

Hook (0-3s):
  Visual: <what is on screen in the first 3 seconds, one sentence>
  On-screen text: <max 8 words, all caps, no punctuation>
  Voiceover/audio: <one sentence said in the first 3 seconds, or 'silent'>

Beats (rest of clip):
  - <0:03 - 0:XX> <what happens, one sentence> | Caption: <max 12 words>
  - <next beat>
  - <next beat>
  - <final beat with call to action>

End card (last 2 seconds):
  Visual: <e.g. 'mchatai.com text-only on solid background'>
  Text: <max 6 words, includes the URL or recipe slug>

Upload copy:
  TikTok caption: <up to 150 chars, 2-3 lowercase hashtags at end>
  YouTube Shorts title: <up to 90 chars, ends with #Shorts>
  Instagram Reels caption: <up to 200 chars, 3-5 hashtags>

After all clips, add:

## Shot list (assets needed)
Bullet list of every screen recording, B-roll moment, image, or stock clip required to assemble the clips. Group by 'screen recordings', 'B-roll', 'stock'.

General rules:
- ASCII only. No smart quotes, no em-dashes (use ' - ' surrounded by spaces).
- Do NOT invent product features or stats.
- Names: mChatAI (capital A, capital I, no space). Product surfaces: AIWizard, Pipelines, Recipes, Skills, Agents, Hub.
- Skip phrases: 'unlock', 'game-changer', 'level up your', 'thrilled to share'.

SOURCE (transcript or topic):
{{INPUT}}
